rows.description: Soluta Ordinaria.
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed as a clear header with no associated monetary amounts.

rows.description: Brot: over
rows.notes: Selected amounts and description from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribed '315 4 10' and 'Brot: over'. gpt-5-mini's reading of '282 13 10' and description 'Bro't over -' are visually incorrect. Changed row_type to 'entry' as it represents a carried-forward balance rather than a sum calculated on this page.
rows.english_description: Balance brought over (carried forward) from the previous page.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance brought over, amounting to £315 4s 10d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Corn purchases for April and October amounting to £17 0s 0d.

rows.description: Parish Rates. St. Michael's. viz. 19. at 13.6.
rows.notes: Selected amounts and description from gemini-flash. Visually confirmed amounts as '12 16 6'. gpt-5-mini inaccurately transcribed amounts as '12 0 0' and admitted ambiguity in its notes. gemini-flash's description punctuation is also more accurate.
rows.english_description: Parish rates for St Michael's (local parish rate assessment).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Parish rates for St Michael's totalling £12 16s 6d.

rows.description: Easter & Mich. Offerings to Do Lichurch Rate. 13.6
rows.notes: Selected amounts and description from gemini-flash. Visually confirmed amounts as '1 14 6'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly transcribed the amount as '12 16 6' (which belongs to the previous row) and made several errors in the description ('Whits.' instead of 'Mich.', 'the Church Rates' instead of 'Lichurch Rate').
rows.english_description: Easter and Michaelmas offerings paid to the church rate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Easter and Michaelmas offerings to the church rate amounting to £1 14s 6d.

rows.description: To Rowell. care of the Clock. 1. yr
rows.notes: Selected amounts and description from gemini-flash. Visually confirmed amounts as '3 3 0'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly transcribed the amount as '1 14 6' (which belongs to the previous row) and then created an 'extra' row for the '3 3 0' amount without a description, indicating a significant parsing error for this block.
rows.english_description: Payment to Rowell for the care/keeping of the clock for one year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Rowell for one year's care of the clock of £3 3s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on the total amount '339 12 10'. Visually confirmed. Description is intentionally blank as per ledger style for this total line.

rows.description: Soluta Varia.
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed as a clear header with no associated monetary amounts.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Final legal bill from Mr Forbes on the Waterton suit amounting to £107 9s 6d.
